# services.rspamd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rspamd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rspamd.debug` | `boolean` | Whether to run the rspamd daemon in debug mode. |
| `services.rspamd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rspamd, the Rapid spam filtering system. |
| `services.rspamd.extraArgs` | `list of string` | A list of extra command line arguments to pass to rspamd. Check `rspamd --help` for possible arguments. |
| `services.rspamd.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration to add at the end of the rspamd configuration file. |
| `services.rspamd.group` | `string` | Group to use when no root privileges are required. |
| `services.rspamd.localLuaRules` | `null or absolute path` | Path of file to link to {file}`/etc/rspamd/rspamd.local.lua` for local rules written in Lua |
| `services.rspamd.locals` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Local configuration files, written into {file}`/etc/rspamd/local.d/{name}`. |
| `services.rspamd.locals.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether this file locals should be generated. This option allows specific locals files to be disabled. |
| `services.rspamd.locals.<name>.source` | `absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.rspamd.locals.<name>.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.rspamd.overrides` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Overridden configuration files, written into {file}`/etc/rspamd/override.d/{name}`. |
| `services.rspamd.overrides.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether this file overrides should be generated. This option allows specific overrides files to be disabled. |
| `services.rspamd.overrides.<name>.source` | `absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.rspamd.overrides.<name>.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.rspamd.package` | `package` | The rspamd package to use. |
| `services.rspamd.postfix.config` | `attribute set of (boolean or string or list of string)` | Addon to postfix configuration |
| `services.rspamd.postfix.enable` | `boolean` | Add rspamd milter to postfix main.conf |
| `services.rspamd.user` | `string` | User to use when no root privileges are required. |
| `services.rspamd.workers` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of workers to start. |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.bindSockets` | `list of (string or (submodule))` | List of sockets to listen, in format acceptable by rspamd |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.count` | `null or signed integer` | Number of worker instances to run |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.enable` | `null or boolean` | Whether to run the rspamd worker. |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional entries to put verbatim into worker section of rspamd config file. |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.includes` | `list of string` | List of files to include in configuration |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.name` | `null or string` | Name of the worker |
| `services.rspamd.workers.<name>.type` | `null or one of "normal", "controller", "fuzzy", "rspamd_proxy", "lua", "proxy"` | The type of this worker. The type `proxy` is deprecated and only kept for backwards compatibility and should be replaced with `rspamd_proxy`. |
